title: Interest accrual off-by-one around period boundaries
hint: Challenge start/end-of-day, month-end, and inclusive/exclusive date handling.

title: Currency rounding and decimal precision drift
hint: Look for 0.01 differences, trailing zeros, and locale-specific separators.

title: Double-submit or repeated confirmation
hint: Attack repeated primary actions, retries, and refresh/reopen behaviour.

title: PII or regulated data displayed without masking
hint: Challenge IBAN, tax id, birth date, and customer identifiers in visible outputs.
testDataHints: customer name with date of birth

title: Cross-record display or IDOR-style leakage
hint: Challenge whether one customer context can reveal another record summary or account data.

title: Mandatory review or confirmation step bypass
hint: Try to skip gating steps through direct navigation or state reuse.

title: Unsupported accounting assumption accepted as valid
hint: Challenge hidden assumptions such as VAT inclusion/exclusion, financing totals, or derived values.
testDataHints: derived total inconsistent with visible operands

title: Cross-field inconsistency slips through validation
hint: Use inconsistent field pairs that should be rejected together, not only individually.

title: Cut-off time or processing window boundary
hint: Look for late submissions that should shift processing behaviour or warnings.

title: Duplicate reference or replayed request
hint: Challenge idempotency and replay handling with repeated identifiers.
